backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a portfolio backend, defining data types and CRUD stores for blog posts, projects, skills, leads, testimonials, services, SEO settings, and social links, along with admin claim/check/reset logic and access control mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that removes the legacy `adminInitialized` field from the actor state during upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: rewriting AdminGuard to use inline II login and correct ClaimAdminResult comparisons, and fixing the useActor hook to eliminate race conditions after login.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key fixes applied to each page, component, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router tree with a public layout (nav/footer) and an admin layout (no nav/footer), registering all public and admin routes under their respective layout parents.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that imperatively checks admin status via the actor whenever it changes, handles inline II login, claim-admin flow with correct ClaimAdminResult enum comparisons, and renders children only when the caller is confirmed admin.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Renders the admin panel sidebar with navigation links, active-state highlighting, logout functionality, and a responsive mobile drawer with overlay.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays the site footer with branding, dynamic social links fetched from the backend, quick navigation links, and contact info.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with the shared Navigation and Footer components inside a full-height flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Provides an Internet Identity login/logout button that invalidates relevant React Query caches on authentication state changes.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop links and a mobile hamburger menu, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Shows a modal dialog prompting newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to create a profile.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: Imperatively updates the document title and meta description tag based on per-page SEO settings fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Button that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend actor calls, covering user profiles, admin operations, testimonials, blog posts, projects, services, skills, leads, SEO settings, and social links.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, charts) along with reusable utility component classes like glow effects and gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page displaying Boby Dhorajiya's profile, stats, bio, core values, and a call-to-action linking to the contact page.
Admin page for managing blog posts with full CRUD operations, a search/pagination list, an inline form with slug auto-generation, and an admin authentication guard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CategoriesManag: Admin page for managing project categories with create, edit, and delete functionality, search filtering, pagination, and an admin authentication guard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard overview page that displays stat cards (projects, leads, blogs, skills, categories) with loading skeletons and links to each management section, protected by an admin guard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Help.tsx: Admin help guide page that renders numbered step-by-step instructions for common admin tasks (adding projects, categories, skills, etc.) using a reusable `HelpSection` component, protected by an admin guard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsManagement: Admin page for viewing and deleting contact form leads, with search, pagination, and an admin guard that restricts access to authenticated admins.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectsManagem: Admin page for creating, editing, and deleting portfolio projects, supporting image upload, category selection, URL, and paginated search, guarded by admin authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SeoManagement.t: Admin page for managing per-page SEO settings (meta title and description), with add/edit/delete functionality, a predefined page list, and admin access guard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServicesManagem: Admin page for managing services (title and description) with add, edit, delete, search, and pagination, protected by an admin authentication guard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SkillsManagemen: Admin page for managing skills with name, years of experience, and category fields, supporting CRUD operations, search, pagination, and admin-only access.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SocialLinksMana: Admin page for managing social media links with full CRUD operations, search, pagination, and toggle active state. Includes an AdminGuard component that restricts access to authenticated admin users.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsMan: Admin page for managing testimonials with create, edit, delete, search, and pagination functionality. Includes an AdminGuard for access control and a reusable TestimonialForm component.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches posts via `useGetBlogs` and renders them as clickable cards with title, description, and date, navigating to individual post pages on click.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Individual blog post page that fetches a post by slug using `useGetBlogBySlug` and renders its title, date, and content, with loading and not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a form (name, email, message) that submits via the `useProcessContactForm` mutation hook and displays contact info (email, location, availability).
frontend/src/pages/Experience.tsx: Static experience page displaying a single timeline entry for a Senior Mobile App Developer role at Nexus IT Solution, listing responsibilities and achievements.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, tech stack display, animated sections, social links fetched from the backend, and an FAQ accordion.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: Simple 404 error page with a message and a link back to the home route.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Projects page that fetches projects and categories, supports category filtering, and renders a responsive grid of project cards with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page that displays backend-fetched services when available, falling back to a static list of seven predefined service cards, with an SEO head component included.
frontend/src/pages/Skills.tsx: Displays a grouped skills page fetched via `useGetSkills`, organizing skills into four categories (primary, secondary, security, additional) with progress bars and loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a testimonials page that fetches and displays client reviews in a card grid, with loading, error, and empty-state handling, plus an SEO head component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers. Also includes a function to remove sensitive parameters from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk, JetBrains Mono), extended color palette using OKLCH values, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 13) documenting the portfolio site's architecture, existing features, known issues, and recent upgrades including dynamic admin panels, security hardening, and new home page sections.
